title: The checkbox should be on the left, not below - on forms.
excerpt:
Description
If you add a true / false question - which is basically a checkbox question, the checkbox appear below the question, not on the side. This is kinda unusual, considering if you use it for agreeing to terms or …

posts.author: akonsadbin (Abdul Taiab Akon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

If you add a true / false question - which is basically a checkbox question, the checkbox appear below the question, not on the side. This is kinda unusual, considering if you use it for agreeing to terms or signing up for newsletters.

What are you trying to achieve

I want to have the checkbox on the side, not below the question.

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Yves

Our monday app Easyform displays the checkbox to the left of the question title

You can check out or documentation here, if you want help setting up or have any questions, you can reach us at easyformsupport@easyapphq.com or book a call with us here.
